chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitution Petition No.S-523 of 2017. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For order son office objection at flag.A. For order on maintainability. Notice issued to respondents No.2. 12.06.2017. Mr. Ghulam Yahya Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Qazi Muhammad Bux State Counsel. ---------------- SIP- Mukhtiar Ali Chandio, SHO, Police Station Bakrani/ respondent No.2 has appeared and files statement that the petitioner has not been harassed nor will be harassed in future. He however, submits that due protection will be provided to the petitioner as and when he approached him. In view of the statement learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E S Ashfaq
